COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-22-2020 FOR SHORT CAUSE TRIAL/PROVE-UP HEARING - CONTINUED TO SEP-28-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN 514 AT THE REQUEST OF ALAN SHERWOOD, ESQ., WHO SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

REMOVED FROM MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-28-2020. MATTER IS RETURNED FROM DEPARTMENT 514 FOR TRIAL. ALAN SHERWOOD, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ROBERT SCHOEN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT DAVID LIU ALSO PRESENT IN COURT. PLAINTIFF IS NOT READY TO PROCEED TO TRIAL. THE COURT ORDERS THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT HAS NO OBJECTION. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
